assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends Extended release channel with detailed explanation of up to 24 months version support and no forced minor upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Shows specific gcloud commands using --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades and explains this allows control plane security patches while blocking disruptive upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Configures maintenance window for Saturdays with 6-hour duration using --maintenance-window-recurrence 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA'

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Creates separate h100-training node pool with taints and a separate infrastructure node pool, with detailed explanation of isolation benefits

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Shows maxSurge=0 and maxUnavailable=1 configuration for training pool and provides detailed runbook for manual upgrades during training gaps

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Includes checkpointing configuration with CHECKPOINT_INTERVAL environment variable, terminationGracePeriodSeconds for checkpointing, and emergency maintenance procedures that trigger checkpoint saves

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Describes multi-environment strategy with dev/staging clusters for testing and mentions 'Channel Progression Pattern' with staging validation before production

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: While it mentions GVNIC and GPUDirect-TCPX performance and compact placement for RDMA topology, it does not specifically note the strict GKE version requirements or emphasize verification of compatibility before upgrading
